feat.name: Gigaton Strike
feat.text: When you use a full-power Megaton Strike, you can knock your foe back. When you succeed at your Strike while using an unstable Megaton Strike, your target must attempt a Fortitude save against your class DC.

traits.name: Inventor
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the inventor class.

feat.success: The creature is pushed back 5 feet.
feat.failure: The creature is pushed back 10 feet.
feat.critical_failure: The creature is pushed back 20 feet.
feat.special: If your innovation is a minion, this benefit applies on its unstable Megaton Strikes.
